name: Beaches Jewelry & Pawn
description_short: Beaches Jewelry & Pawn is a Jacksonville Beach pawn shop established in 1995 that buys, sells, and loans against jewelry, electronics, musical instruments, and sporting equipment.
description_long:
Beaches Jewelry & Pawn has operated in Jacksonville Beach, Florida since 1995, establishing itself as a long-standing pawn shop in the local community. The business is located at 679 3rd St S, Jacksonville Beach, FL 32250, and serves the Jacksonville Beaches area with both retail and pawn services. The shop is operated by an owner known as Chuck, who is described by long-term customers as educated and professional. The business maintains a physical storefront with regular operating hours and accepts customer inquiries via phone and online contact forms.

The company offers pawn loans against collateral items as well as retail sales of used merchandise. Their inventory includes surfboards, paddleboards, guitars, jewelry, electronics, and power tools. Customers can bring items to pawn for short-term loans or purchase pre-owned merchandise from stock. The business also appears to engage in jewelry and precious metals buying, given their category focus.

Beaches Jewelry & Pawn distinguishes itself through longevity and community reputation. Customer testimonials indicate multi-year customer relationships, with at least one customer reporting over five years of patronage. The owner's local presence and personal customer service approach appears to be a differentiating factor, though the website provides limited details about specific loan terms, interest rates, or policies.

As a pawn shop, this business serves customers needing quick cash against collateral or those seeking used merchandise bargains. However, the website lacks transparency regarding loan-to-value ratios, APR rates, repayment terms, or redemption policies—standard information consumers need when considering pawn loans. No details are provided about how quickly loans are funded, what documentation is required, or how items are valued.
pros: Established business since 1995 with long-term community presence and stability
Owner (Chuck) personally involved and described by customers as educated and professional
Documented multi-year customer loyalty, with testimonial from customer reporting 5+ years of patronage
Diverse inventory across six major categories (surfboards, paddleboards, guitars, jewelry, electronics, power tools)
Physical storefront location with posted phone number and business hours for in-person service
Quick access to cash loans available without credit checks typical of pawn transactions
Both pawn loan and retail merchandise purchase options in one location
cons: Website provides zero transparency on loan terms, APR rates, loan-to-value ratios, or repayment periods
No information disclosed about required documentation, item appraisal process, or storage/insurance fees
Limited customer testimonials (only one visible review on website) for a 29-year-old business
No details on redemption timeline, late fees, or what happens to unredeemed items
Website lacks any FAQ, educational content, or pawn process explanation for first-time customers
best_for: Customers needing immediate cash who have jewelry, electronics, or musical instruments to use as collateral
Jacksonville Beach area residents seeking used surfboards, paddleboards, or guitars at retail prices
People looking for quick loans without credit checks or income verification
Bargain hunters for used power tools, electronics, and sporting equipment
diagnosis: Beaches Jewelry & Pawn is best for Jacksonville Beach-area residents who own valuables (jewelry, electronics, instruments, sports gear) and need quick cash without a credit check or formal loan application. The main caveat is the complete lack of transparency on the website regarding loan terms, rates, and policies—consumers must visit in person or call to understand the actual cost and terms before pawning items.
services: Pawn loans against guitars and musical instruments
Pawn loans against surfboards and paddleboards
Retail sales of used surfboards and paddleboards
Retail sales of used power tools
